      rw [h_inner_self]
      simp only [HermitianMat.inner] at h_cross
      linarith
    have h_nonneg : (ρ.M - (pure ψ).M).inner (ρ.M - (pure ψ).M) ≥ 0 := 
      HermitianMat.inner_self_nonneg _
    have h_le : ρ.M.inner ρ.M - 1 ≥ 0 := by linarith
    have h_eq : ρ.M.inner ρ.M = 1 := by linarith
    have h_zero : (ρ.M - (pure ψ).M).inner (ρ.M - (pure ψ).M) = 0 := by linarith
    exact HermitianMat.inner_self_eq_zero.mp h_zero
  · intro h
    rw [h]
    simp only [MState.exp_val, HermitianMat.inner, MState.pure_mul_self, Matrix.trace_one]

constructor
  · intro h
    ext
    have h_inner : ρ.M.inner (pure ψ).M = 1 := by
      simp only [MState.exp_val, HermitianMat.inner] at h
      exact h
    have h_diff_zero : (ρ.M - (pure ψ).M).inner (ρ.M - (pure ψ).M) = 0 := by
      have h1 : ρ.M.inner ρ.M ≤ 1 := by
        have := ρ.M.inner_le_mul_trace ρ.zero_le ρ.zero_le
        simp [ρ.tr] at this
        exact this
      have h2 : (pure ψ).M.inner (pure ψ).M = 1 := by
        simp only [HermitianMat.inner, MState.pure_mul_self, Matrix.trace_one]
      calc (ρ.M - (pure ψ).M).inner (ρ.M - (pure ψ).M) 
          = ρ.M.inner ρ.M - 2 * ρ.M.inner (pure ψ).M + (pure ψ).M.inner (pure ψ).M := by
            simp only [HermitianMat.inner, Matrix.sub_mul, Matrix.mul_sub, Matrix.trace_sub]
            ring
        _ = ρ.M.inner ρ.M - 2 * 1 + 1 := by rw [h_inner, h2]
        _ = ρ.M.inner ρ.M - 1 := by ring
        _ ≤ 0 := by linarith
      have h_ge : (ρ.M - (pure ψ).M).inner (ρ.M - (pure ψ).M) ≥ 0 := 
        HermitianMat.inner_self_nonneg _
      linarith
    have h_eq_zero : ρ.M - (pure ψ).M = 0 := HermitianMat.inner_self_eq_zero.mp h_diff_zero
    exact sub_eq_zero.mp (congrArg HermitianMat.m h_eq_zero)
  · intro h
    rw [h]
    simp only [MState.exp_val, HermitianMat.inner, MState.pure_mul_self, Matrix.trace_one]
